name: 72"x14" Botanical Floral Table Runner - Threshold™
description:
Refresh your tablescape with this Botanical Floral Table Runner from Threshold™. Crafted from 100% cotton, this rectangular table runner measures 72 inches long by 14 inches wide and features a white, blue and peach floral pattern with brown branches and green leaves on a light green backdrop for a charming, garden-inspired look. Plus, the machine-washable fabric makes it easy to clean after everyday meals or special gatherings.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
